start_lesson: Ready to explore? I'm right behind you!
fail_hint: Let's take a smaller step first.
That's okay! Every explorer makes mistakes.
How about we try a different approach?
finish: Nice! Another step on the trail.
Excellent work! I knew you could do it.
That's the spirit of a true explorer!
streak: That's {n} in a row—steady as we go!
You're on fire with {n} straight wins!
Amazing streak of {n}! Keep it up!
Incredible! {n} perfect lessons in a row!
encourage: You've got this! I'm here to help.
